prompt: We need a name for a system that takes a single customer onboarding flow definition and generates platform-specific implementations - web, iOS, Android, and email. The whole point is write-once, render-everywhere for onboarding experiences.

assertions.name: reasoning-before-names
assertions.description: A reasoning/analysis step identifying core function and metaphor appears before any name candidates

assertions.name: real-words-only
assertions.description: All candidate names are real English words, not invented portmanteaus or brand names

assertions.name: no-generic-labels
assertions.description: No candidates use banned generic terms: Renderer, Builder, Platform, Hub, Cloud, Sync, Engine, Suite, Assistant

assertions.name: multiple-candidates
assertions.description: At least 5 distinct name candidates are proposed

assertions.name: explains-fit
assertions.description: At least 2 candidates have a brief explanation of why they fit the product
